creator: freebsd-bugs@joe.mulloy.me
text:
(In reply to Andrey V. Elsukov from comment #5)

I am building all of my packages via poudriere and both packages were rebuilt with the patch you provided. Looking at "setkeys -D" it seems like the patch worked for bird6. Perhaps something isn't happening correctly on the kernel side in the ipv6 code path?

If there is anything you would like me to do to debug this please let me know.

Thanks
